column1: # WadsRadio station list: Hong Kong radio stations
# Columns: station name, stream URL, volume offset, stream type
# WadsRadio supports direct streams and HLS .m3u8 streams; the fourth column marks which source type is used.
# CRHK 881/903/864 are not included: current streams require short-lived signed CloudFront cookies, and old hktoolbar redirects no longer resolve.
# Apple FM entries from Radio Browser are not included because their stream hosts did not resolve during verification.
RTHK Radio 6 / CNR Hong Kong Voice
RTHK Radio 8 / CMG Greater Bay Area Voice
# Hong Kong local and internet stations
La French Radio Hong Kong and Macao
